name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning at {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a gentle check-in before your day fills up. Yesterday brought a few new faces to Bright Smile and some fresh appointments on the books — nothing that needs your attention right now, but worth a smile over coffee.

We'll keep things running smoothly on this end. If anything needs a closer look, it'll be waiting for you in the dashboard.

Warmly,
— Bright Smile Dental
